message:
fix(wasm): use filtered screen registry + cache runner output drains

- screens/mod.rs: screen_ids(), screen_index(), screens_in_category() now
  use screen_registry() (filtered) instead of raw SCREEN_REGISTRY, so
  feature-gated screens are properly excluded
- runner_core.rs: cache patch_hash, patch_stats, and logs from
  take_flat_patches() to avoid draining the output buffer multiple times

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
